title: A Scary Halloween Story
text: They say my school is haunted; my {adjective} friend {person}says they saw a {adjective} {noun} floating at the end of the hall near the cafeteria. Some say if you {verb} down that hallway at night, you'll hear a {animal} growling deeply. My {adjective} friend {person} saw a {adjective} {noun} slithering under the tables once. I hope I never see any {noun} crawling; eating lunch there is scary enough!
